task_completion.description: Verify the correct dataset is loaded into Oracle Analytics Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data panel on the left side of the screen shows 'sample_order_lines2023' or its columns (like 'Customer Segment' and 'Sales').

task_completion.description: Verify a funnel chart visualization has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A funnel-shaped chart is visible on the main canvas, and the visualization type icon in the grammar panel indicates 'Funnel'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Customer Segment' is mapped to the category and 'Sales' to the values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the grammar panel, 'Customer Segment' is placed in the Category/Color section, and 'Sales' is placed in the Values/Measure section.

task_completion.description: Verify the chart is sorted in descending order and data labels are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The funnel chart is widest at the top and narrowest at the bottom (descending order), and numerical values/labels are visibly displayed on or next to the funnel segments.

task_completion.description: Verify the visualization title is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title above the chart on the canvas explicitly reads 'Revenue by Customer Segment'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top application title bar displays 'SegmentFunnel', or a save dialog/file explorer shows 'SegmentFunnel.dva' being saved to the Documents folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to build the chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface (e.g., dragging and dropping columns, clicking menus) rather than terminal windows or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the chart is rendered inside the actual Oracle Analytics application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The surrounding UI elements (Data panel, Grammar panel, Properties panel) belong to Oracle Analytics Desktop, not an image viewer, web browser, or drawing tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected title and mock data into a text editor or spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows a genuine BI tool canvas with a rendered funnel chart, not a spreadsheet cell or text document formatted to look like a chart.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected workbook filename is 'SegmentFunnel.dva' saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'. The visualization must be a 'funnel' chart. The mapped dimension must be 'Customer Segment' and the measure must be 'Sales'. The visualization title must exactly match 'Revenue by Customer Segment'.
